title: Mudit Sharma – Khudrang Kalakaar Wall Painting Portfolio Website

requirements.text: Apply a consistent visual theme across the entire portfolio: white and light grey (#F5F5F5) backgrounds, Poppins as the primary font, bold uppercase section headings, generous uniform margins and padding on all pages, warm earthy accent color (terracotta or ochre) for highlights and dividers, and a clean minimal layout that lets imagery breathe.

quotes: Same margin & spacing on all pages

acceptanceCriteria: Background is white or light grey throughout
Poppins font is applied globally
All section headings are bold
Margins and spacing are consistent across all pages/sections
An earthy accent color is used for highlights and decorative elements

requirements.text: Create a full-screen Cover Section (Page 1) displaying: artist name 'MUDIT SHARMA' in large bold text, subtitle 'Professional Wall Painting Artist', location '📍 Bikaner, Rajasthan', experience badge '🖌 5+ Years Experience', and tagline '"Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art."' overlaid on a full-page hero mural background image (cover-hero.dim_1920x1080.png). Text must be legible over the image with a semi-transparent dark overlay.

quotes: Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.
Background: Full page strong mural image with minimal text

acceptanceCriteria: Full-screen hero section displays the mural background image
Artist name, subtitle, location, experience, and tagline are all visible
A semi-transparent overlay ensures text readability over the image
Layout is centered and visually impactful

requirements.text: Create an About the Artist section (Page 2) with a heading 'About Mudit Sharma', a professional portrait placeholder area on one side, and the bio text on the other: 'Mudit Sharma is a professional wall painting artist based in Bikaner, Rajasthan, with over 5 years of experience in residential, commercial, and public mural projects. He specializes in customized wall art that enhances spaces and creates strong visual impact. His focus is on clean finishing, creative concepts, and complete client satisfaction.'

quotes: Mudit Sharma is a professional wall painting artist based in Bikaner, Rajasthan

acceptanceCriteria: Section heading 'About Mudit Sharma' is displayed prominently
Full bio paragraph text is present and readable
Layout uses a two-column arrangement (image placeholder + text) on wider screens
Section is visually balanced

requirements.text: Create a Services Offered section (Page 3) with heading 'Our Services' displaying these 7 services in a clean grid or list with checkmark icons: Home Wall Murals, Kids Room Theme Painting, Café & Restaurant Concept Walls, Hotel & Resort Artwork, Public Infrastructure Art, 3D Illusion Wall Designs, Custom Hand-Painted Designs.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 services are listed with checkmark icons
Section heading 'Our Services' is bold and prominent
Services are displayed in a responsive grid (2–3 columns on desktop, 1 column on mobile)
Each service item is clearly readable

requirements.text: Create a Why Choose Us section (Page 4) with heading 'Why Clients Trust Us' displaying these 6 trust points with checkmark icons: 5+ Years Practical Experience, Unique Custom Designs, Premium Quality Paints, Professional & Clean Work, On-Time Project Completion, Budget-Friendly Packages.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 trust points are displayed with checkmark icons
Section heading 'Why Clients Trust Us' is bold and prominent
Points are arranged in a grid (2–3 columns on desktop)
Section uses a slightly different background shade to visually differentiate it

requirements.text: Create 5 Featured Project sections (Pages 5–9), each with the project image occupying ~70% of the section width and project details in the remaining 30%. Projects and their details: (1) 'Café Wall Art Project' – vibrant Instagram-worthy atmosphere, enhances interior vibe, modern aesthetic; (2) 'Sawai Madhopur Overbridge' – Location: Sawai Madhopur, public infrastructure mural, beautifies overbridge, reflects cultural identity; (3) 'Sanskriti Fort & Resort' – heritage-themed property, enhances royal ambiance, fine detailing; (4) 'Hotel & Resort Wall Art' – elevates guest experience, creative visual storytelling, adds character and sophistication; (5) 'Jiman Restaurant – Bikaner' – traditional restaurant vibe, enhances customer engagement, memorable dining atmosphere. Each section includes the project name as a bold heading, description text, and a location badge where applicable. Use generated placeholder project images for each.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 project sections are present in order
Each project shows a large image (~70% width) and a text panel (~30% width)
Project name, description, and location (where applicable) are displayed
Alternate image-left/image-right layout between projects for visual variety
Sections are clearly separated with consistent spacing

requirements.text: Create a Contact section (Page 10) with heading 'Let's Transform Your Space', displaying: location '📍 Bikaner, Rajasthan', Instagram '@khudrangkalakaar' (linked to https://instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar), WhatsApp contact (display 'WhatsApp: [Add Number]' as a placeholder), and availability note 'Available for Residential & Commercial Projects'. Include a prominent call-to-action button linking to WhatsApp.
acceptanceCriteria: Heading 'Let's Transform Your Space' is displayed
Location, Instagram handle, WhatsApp placeholder, and availability note are all shown
Instagram handle is a clickable link
A WhatsApp CTA button is present
Section has a visually distinct background to signal end-of-page

requirements.text: Add a sticky navigation bar at the top of the page with the artist name/logo 'Khudrang Kalakaar' on the left and smooth-scroll anchor links on the right: About, Services, Why Us, Projects, Contact. On mobile, collapse to a hamburger menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is fixed at the top and visible while scrolling
All 5 nav links scroll smoothly to their respective sections
Artist brand name is displayed on the left
On mobile, a hamburger menu reveals the nav links
Active section is visually indicated in the nav

requirements.text: Render all generated images (cover hero mural, about portrait, and 5 project images) as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them in the respective components.

quotes: Background: Full page strong mural image with minimal text

acceptanceCriteria: All images load correctly from frontend/public/assets/generated/
No broken image links on any section
Images are responsive and maintain aspect ratio

constraints: No backend required — this is a purely static frontend portfolio site
All content is hardcoded based on the provided portfolio structure
Use Poppins or Montserrat font only (via Google Fonts import)
Do not add any CMS, login, or form-submission backend
nonGoals: Backend data storage or API integration

required: Dramatic full-wall mural painting with bold colors — vibrant abstract patterns in deep reds, oranges, and golds on a large architectural wall surface (cover-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)
A male artist painting a colorful mural on a wall, brush in hand, warm earthy tones, artistic studio setting (artist-portrait.dim_800x900.png)
Vibrant café interior wall mural with bright colors, tropical or geometric patterns, modern aesthetic (project-cafe.dim_1200x800.png)
Large public infrastructure overbridge mural with cultural motifs, Rajasthani folk art patterns, vivid colors on concrete surface (project-overbridge.dim_1200x800.png)
Heritage fort wall painting with royal Rajasthani motifs — elephants, peacocks, intricate patterns in gold and royal blue (project-fort-resort.dim_1200x800.png)
Luxury hotel corridor with decorative wall art murals in warm tones, sophisticated floral and geometric patterns (project-hotel.dim_1200x800.png)
Traditional Indian restaurant interior wall painting with warm earthy tones, ethnic patterns, and cultural motifs evoking Rajasthani heritage (project-restaurant.dim_1200x800.png)
